Name: SHOP_LINEUP_PARAM
Description: Defines a shop inventory entry, including item availability conditions, pricing, and display ordering.

Fields.Name: Item ID for Sale
Fields.Description: ID of the item available for purchase in the shop.

Fields.Name: Price
Fields.Description: Base purchase price of the item.

Fields.Name: Sale Start Flag
Fields.Description: Flag that enables the item to become available for sale.

Fields.Name: Sale End Flag
Fields.Description: Flag that disables the item from being sold.

Fields.Name: Sale Unlock Item Condition
Fields.Description: Item condition required to unlock the sale of this product.

Fields.Name: Sale End Condition Item
Fields.Description: Item condition that triggers removal of this product from sale.

Fields.Name: Display Order
Fields.Description: Order in which the item appears in the shop list.

Fields.Name: Price Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to the base price.

Fields.Name: Stock Quantity
Fields.Description: Number of units available for purchase.
